activities_projects.title: Plant a Seed Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand how plants grow from seeds
steps: Take a small pot and fill it with soil
Plant a seed in the soil similar to how Rakesh planted the cherry seed
Water the plant every day
Observe and record the plant growth for one week
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn about plant growth and the importance of care and patience

activities_projects.title: Story Sequence Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand the sequence of events in the story
steps: Read the story carefully
Identify important events such as planting the seed and the tree growing
Arrange these events in the correct order
Write the sequence in your notebook
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve reading comprehension and sequencing skills

activities_projects.title: Cause and Effect Exercise
activities_projects.objective: Understand relationships between events in the story
steps: Identify events such as the goat eating the leaves or the tree being cut
Write the cause and the effect of each event
Discuss the answers with classmates
Share your findings in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop analytical thinking and understanding of story structure

activities_projects.title: Character Study of Rakesh
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the personality traits of the main character
steps: Read the story again focusing on Rakesh
List his qualities such as patience and curiosity
Write examples from the story to support each quality
Discuss your observations with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand character development in stories
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity of explanation and examples (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Grandfather and Rakesh Relationship Discussion
activities_projects.objective: Understand family relationships in the story
steps: Identify conversations between Rakesh and his grandfather
Discuss how the grandfather guides Rakesh
Write a short paragraph about their relationship
Share your paragraph with the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the importance of guidance and family bonding
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of ideas and participation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Nature Appreciation Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand the connection between humans and nature
steps: Discuss how the cherry tree grows despite difficulties
Identify examples of nature in the story
Write why trees are important for humans
Share your thoughts in class discussion
activities_projects.evaluation: Participation and clarity of ideas (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Identification
steps: Identify new words such as 'plodded', 'scrambled', and 'gazed'
Write their meanings in your notebook
Use each word in a new sentence
Discuss meanings with classmates
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students enhance vocabulary and language skills

activities_projects.title: Taste Words Exercise
steps: Read the list of taste words such as sweet, sour, and bitter
Match the taste words with given food items
Write the answers in your notebook
Create five sentences using the taste words
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct matching and sentence formation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Tense Identification Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand past tense forms used in storytelling
steps: Read sentences from the chapter
Identify verbs in each sentence
Write whether they are in simple past, past progressive, or past perfect
Create two sentences of your own using each tense
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct tense identification and sentence writing (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Article Writing on Trees
activities_projects.objective: Develop writing skills and environmental awareness
steps: Read the article format given in the chapter
Write an article titled 'Trees – Our Lifeline'
Include introduction, importance of trees, and suggestions
Submit the article to your teacher
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students improve article writing and awareness about nature
